title: Garek
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Sullustan|[[Garek Tolas]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Garek.png]] |name=Garek |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Rebel|Helping the Alliance|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Gray |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I hear you are connected to certain individuals not friendly to the Empire.''"
"''Is that so? Maybe I am. Maybe I am not. How do I know where your allegiance lies?|A spacer and Garek|}} '''Garek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Our spies tell us that the Empire has formed a temporary alliance with the Rak'qua over in Station Gamma. We also think that they may have uncovered the location of our secret base. I need you to get in there and access the databank to find out if they have tracked down our brethren.|Garek, to a spacer|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Rebel|Gathering the Dirt on the Imperials|Tansarii Point Station}}}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] Garek was stationed on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, he managed a network of Rebel spies collecting information regarding Imperial activity, including [[Rund Jesela]] and [[Adery Shrial]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Garek was very concerned about the [[Rak'qua]], a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] tribe living in [[Station Gamma]], another space station in the Bright Jewel system. Rebels spies suspected that the Rak'qua had formed an alliance with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], allowing Imperials to perform horrible experiments in the station. Garek therefore recruited a group of loyal Rebel spacers to investigate the situation. To evaluate his new recruits, Garek first tasked them to retrieve [[Datacard/Legends|datadisks]] with important information from Rebel agents on Tansarii Point Station. Although the datadisks only contained [[Grandma Drake]]'s soup recipes, the spacers achieved their first mission. They were later ordered to proceed to their new objective: the Rak'qua of Station Gamma. The spacers therefore raided the station, killing a number of hostile Rak'qua during the attack, and successfully [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]] the Station Gamma [[Memory bank/Legends|databank]]. The spacers then returned safely to Tansarii Point Station and delivered the information to Agent Garek. Although Rebel spies were right about an alliance existing between the Rak'qua and the Empire, this arrangement had in fact already been broken by the Rak'qua at that time.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Imperial|Get Information From Station Gamma|Tansarii Point Station}} ==Behind the scenes== Garek appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Garek was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Gathering the Dirt on the Imperials}} *{{SWGWiki|Helping the Alliance}} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Spies]] [[Category:Sullustans]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
